auditor: Cloudflare AI architecture audit protocol (Codex-executed local D1 and worker inspection)

scheduledWorkerIsolation.notes: src/worker.ts executes R2 cleanup, SNS cron, and Shop email queue in separate try/catch blocks.

resendGracefulDegradation.notes: RESEND_API_KEY missing path mock-delivers without throwing and updates the D1 queue row.

stripeWebhook.notes: Webhook route refuses mutation unless STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is configured and signature validation succeeds.

smokeResults.emailQueueRetryLocal: scanned=1, sent=1, failed=0, mocked=1; failed row retried and marked sent

remainingOperationalNotes: Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET before real Stripe onboarding.
Set RESEND_API_KEY before real outbound email delivery; without it, queue rows are mock-delivered by design.
Add retention cleanup for old sent/failed email logs in a later maintenance phase.
